series_metadata.series_title: Application for Finder Certificate of Registration
series_metadata.series_description: This record retention schedule consists of Applications for Finder Certificate of Registration and accompanying documentation submitted to the Division.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until application and all supporting documentation is properly imaged and indexed. once images are confirmed as complete and legible paper can be shredded. ; Electronic: Electronic images are to be retained as long as the Certificate of Finder Registration is valid. Scanned images are to be retained for ten years after the final expiration date of the registration, withdrawal of an application or denial of an application., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
